'''Jedi Counseling''' was a regular feature on the [[Wizards of the Coast]] website which provided rules clarifications for players of the [[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]], the later [[Saga Edition]] roleplaying game, and [[Star Wars Miniatures]]. It ultimately had 115 issues posted. It was written by [[Gary M. Sarli]] for its latter run, but was written for the first 50 issues by [[J.D. Wiker]]. Issues 1 to 99 dealt with the Star Wars Roleplaying Game, while issues 100 to 115 dealt with the Saga Edition game system.

The Jedi Counseling articles dealt with various themes. The titles were as follows:
*[[Jedi Counseling]] 1: [[Tutaminis|Drain Energy]]
*Jedi Counseling 2: [[All Terrain Armored Transport/Legends|AT-ATs]]
*Jedi Counseling 3: [[New Jedi Order era|NJO]] Ships
*Jedi Counseling 4: Friendship
*Jedi Counseling 5: [[Lightsaber/Legends|Lightsaber]] Fumbles
*Jedi Counseling 6: Shipbuilding
*Jedi Counseling 7: [[Carbonite/Legends|Carbonite]] Freezing
*Jedi Counseling 8: One-Handed!
*Jedi Counseling 9: Spinning Ships
*Jedi Counseling 10: [[Force lightning/Legends|Force Lightning]]
*Jedi Counseling 11: [[Mind trick/Legends#Force illusion|Illusion]] Confusion
*Jedi Counseling 12: [[Ewok/Legends|Ewok]] Jedi?
*Jedi Counseling 13: [[The Force/Legends|The Force]]
*Jedi Counseling 14: Run Away!
*Jedi Counseling 15: [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|Dark Side]] Points
*Jedi Counseling 16: New Rules?
*Jedi Counseling 17: Killing [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]

*Jedi Counseling 19: Illusion Confusion 2
*Jedi Counseling 20: Boom!
*Jedi Counseling 21: [[Telepathy/Legends|Telepathy]]

*Jedi Counseling 39: Big Deflections
*Jedi Counseling 40: [[Grenade/Legends|Grenade]] Aid

*(Jedi Counseling 56 to 99 dealt with various topics but were untitled)
*Jedi Counseling 100: [[Saga Edition]] overview!
*Jedi Counseling 101: Saga Edition's New Damage System and More
*Jedi Counseling 102: Saga Edition's Heroic Classes and Q&As on Twin Attack
*Jedi Counseling 103: Defense, Offense, and Rules on Mini Names
*Jedi Counseling 104: The Last Word on Saga Edition, and Lots of Words on Commander Effects
*Jedi Counseling 105
